name: Mars 3 lander
fact: First soft landing on Mars. The lander touched down successfully and began transmitting data — for 14.5 seconds. A planet-wide dust storm at the time of arrival is the leading explanation for the silence that followed. Despite the brevity, Mars 3 proved a Martian soft landing was possible: a foundational engineering result built on by every Mars lander since.
capability: First successful Mars EDL — proved soft-landing was a solved problem before American hardware tried it.
